LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS ROCKET LAWYER INCORPORATED AND ACENDI INTERACTIVE COMPANY, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE DISMISSED AS A MATTER OF LAW ON THE GROUNDS THAT PLAINTIFF WAS PROPERLY CLASSIFIED AS AN EXEMPT EMPLOYEE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 437C(G)). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ROCKET LAWYER INCORPORATED and ACENDI INTERACTIVE COMPANY, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is Granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff's First and Second Causes of Action are dismissed as a matter of law on the grounds that plaintiff was properly classified as an exempt employee. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order in compliance with CCP 437c(g)). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
